title: BJP likely to contest fewer seats in Kerala as allies demand greater accommodation

title: Source: Steelers add RB Dowdle on 2-year deal
content: The Steelers are signing former Panthers standout running back Rico Dowdle to a two-year, $12.25 million deal, NFL Network reported Monday.

title: Big-spending Raiders add Linderbaum, Walker

content: The Giants addressed their need at cornerback, agreeing with Greg Newsome II on a one-year deal worth up to $10 million, his agents told ESPN.

title: SGA ties Wilt, drains clutch 3s in MVP showdown

title: NCAA will use tech to eye tourney refs for betting
content: The NCAA announced Tuesday that it will monitor basketball, baseball and softball tournament officials for betting using a technology called ProhiBet.

title: Golfer Woodland opens up about PTSD diagnosis
content: Gary Woodland said Monday he has been battling post-traumatic stress disorder in the wake of his 2023 brain surgery, telling Golf Channel in an emotional interview that he "can't waste energy" trying to hide it anymore.

title: Dort apologizes to Jokic after another flagrant
content: Thunder wing Luguentz Dort said he apologized to Nuggets center Nikola Jokic after committing a second fourth-quarter flagrant foul on him in the past two weeks.

content: Former Jaguars linebacker Devin Lloyd agreed to a three-year, $45 million deal with the Panthers, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Monday.

title: Sources: Tua to sign 1-year deal with Falcons
content: Former Miami Dolphins quarterback Tua Tagovailoa plans to sign a one-year deal with the Atlanta Falcons, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Commanders land Oweh on 4-year, $100M deal
content: Former Chargers defensive end Odafe Oweh, who has 17.5 sacks since 2024, has agreed with the Commanders on a four-year, $100 million deal, his agents told ESPN.

title: Sources: QB Willis, Fins reach 3-year, $67.5M deal
content: Free agent QB Malik Willis, after reviving his career with the Packers, has agreed to a three-year, $67.5 million deal with the Dolphins, sources told ESPN.

title: Source: Saints spend $113M on Etienne, Edwards
content: The Saints have reached a four-year, $52M deal with ex-Jaguars RB Travis Etienne Jr. and a four-year, $61M deal with guard David Edwards, sources told ESPN.

title: Colts re-sign WR Pierce, trade Pittman to Steelers
content: The Indianapolis Colts are re-signing wide receiver Alec Pierce but are trading his running mate Michael Pittman Jr. out of town.

title: Source: Kelce returning to Chiefs on 1-year deal
content: Tight end Travis Kelce, a three-time champion with the Chiefs, has agreed to a one-year deal that is worth $12M and can max out at $15M, a source told ESPN.

title: Here are the big stories from Karnataka today
content: Welcome to the Karnataka Today newsletter, your guide from The Hindu on the major news stories to follow today. Curated and written by Nalme Nachiyar.

title: TTD’s Pranadanam Trust brings relief to poor patients for 25 years
content: Over 27,700 patients treated with support worth ₹158 crore as donations to the trust cross ₹520 crore since 2001

title: Kodagu: Two deaths in elephant attacks raised in Council
content: Forest Minister Eshwar Khandre says sincere efforts are being made to find a permanent solution to the increasing human-elephant conflict

title: Rahul Gandhi has never bowed before this government, says Priyanka
content: Congress leader takes swipe at Parliamentary Affairs Minister Kiren Rijiju for quoting Jawaharlal Nehru in the Lok Sabha

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: Vijay begins interviewing TVK ticket aspirants
content: TVK joint general secretary C.T.R. Nirmalkumar said the party continued to receive applications from ticket aspirants and they were being scrutinised

title: Kochi Corporation council meet ends in discord over loan row, LDF registers dissent
content: Development projects worth about ₹207.48 crore, including ₹133 crore under the plan fund, were placed before the council

title: Indian restaurants cut rava dosas, parottas and pizza as LPG shortage spreads
content: With commercial LPG supply restricted across India, restaurants are rationing fuel, trimming menus and shortening hours as they prepare for possible shutdowns. Induction cooktops are replacing gas burners, biryani is being slow cooked, and in some kitchens the sigri is back.

title: LPG supply stable in Telangana; stringent action against hoarding or black marketing cylinders: Officials
content: 2.3 lakh cylinders are daily supplied by the Oil Marketing Companies (OMCs): Telangana Civil Supplies Department Commissioner

title: Cabinet approves extension of Jal Jeevan Mission till December 2028: Ashwini Vaishnaw
content: The project was launched by Prime Minister Narendra Modi in 2019 to provide safe and adequate drinking water through tap connections to all households in rural India

title: Accepted Finance portfolio for the first time in 1994 at Deve Gowda’s insistence: CM Siddaramaiah
content: ‘Mr. Gowda persuaded me to take up finance portfolio, saying that he wanted someone trustworthy to handle it. Though I did not know anything about finances, I took it up...’

title: A.P. government appoints special officers to ULBs
content: The term of the elected bodies of 86 ULBs will be coming to an end on March 17, 2026 and the term of 13 ULBs will be coming to an end on November 22, 2026

title: Excise policy case: Delhi HC seeks response of Kejriwal, Sisodia on ED plea to expunge remarks
content: Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma said the observations in the trial court order, which discharged all the 23 accused in the CBI case, appeared to be general in nature

title: LPG shortage sparks fear of hotel closures and food price hike in Kerala
content: Shortage of commercial LPG cylinders is threatening to severely impact hospitality sector in Kerala, along with other key sectors

title: Organ transplantation: 217 registered hospitals fail to report data on National Registry Portal in 2025
content: The registration of hospitals for performing organ transplantation is carried out by the appropriate authority of the States and UTs concerned where the hospital is located, Minister of State for Health Jadhav said in a written reply to a query

title: Opposition questions silence of Deputy Chief Minister D.K. Shivakumar on Karnataka Budget
content: In a lighter vein, Leader of Opposition R. Ashok said that Mr. Shivakumar had shared his detailed comments on the budget with the Congress high command during his recent visit to Delhi

title: Why a village in Karnataka is mourning the death of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
content: Karnataka village recalls 1981 visit when Khamenei inaugurated community hospital, an event that strengthened Alipur’s spiritual connection with Iran.

title: 19-year-old from Rajasthan arrested for theft of diamonds, gold worth ₹3 crore from locked house at Yelahanka in Bengaluru
content: Police said the resident of the house used to travel to the U.S. once every six months to meet her husband who is employed in the U.S.

title: LPG shortage shuts 20% of Mumbai eateries, industry warns of wider closures
content: Hotel associations say supply disruptions linked to West Asia conflict could force up to 50% of restaurants in Mumbai to shut within days

title: Rule of law gone for ride in West Bengal, says Leader of House Nadda in Rajya Sabha
content: Replying to a supplementary query during Question Hour in the Rajya Sabha, J.P. Nadda said the government in West Bengal was to blame for the situation arising out of Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls in the State

title: Government seeks Lok Sabha nod for ₹2.81 lakh crore gross additional expenditure in FY26
content: The second batch of Supplementary Demands for Grants was tabled in the Lok Sabha by Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman

title: LPG shortage crisis: Mysuru hoteliers ready to pay any price for a cylinder, but none available
content: Hotel Owners’ Association of Mysuru President Narayanagowda C. said the city has an estimated 1,500 hotels, restaurants, fast food outlets, tea stalls and other eateries that rely on commercial LPG for their operations

title: T.N. CM Stalin unveils statue highlighting significance of education at the Marina
content: At another event held at the Secretariat, the Chief Minister also released a book on century-old trees in Chennai

title: Citing misuse, DG issues circular to regulate special interview for prisoners in Karnataka
content: According to the order, the Chief Superintendent may permit special interviews on a case-to-case basis, but only after recording valid reasons in writing, and ensuring that security considerations are not compromised

title: Farooq Abdullah meets Iran's deputy ambassador, offers condolences on Khamenei's death
content: Expressing his solidarity with the people of Iran, Farooq Abdullah said it is not only the region that is suffering, but the entire world has also been engulfed in an unwanted crisis

title: Karur stampede case: CBI summons TVK chief Vijay again for questioning on March 15
content: Earlier, Mr. Vijay was summoned by the agency to appear before it in New Delhi on Tuesday, for which the party had sought a 15-day extension, besides requesting the agency to record his statement in Chennai

title: Australian GP overreactions: Verstappen could quit F1? McLaren on the ropes?
content: After a wild, often polarising Australian Grand Prix weekend, ESPN looks at some of the sweeping generalisations being made about Formula 1 and judges whether they're overblown or not.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal, Barcelona linked with out-of-contract Dortmund star
content: Arsenal and Barcelona are keen on Borussia Dortmund's Julian Brandt, while Real Madrid have again been linked with Manchester City's Rodri. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Complete coverage: Indian hotels grapple with gas shortage as West Asia conflict prolongs
content: Hotel associations and several hoteliers have warned that non-availability of cooking gas would force many units to shut their shops With the ongoing conflict in West Asia disrupting the global energy supply chain, India is facing a supply issue with cooking gas

title: Kerala Assembly polls: KPCC cracks whip on premature candidate declarations by leaders
content: KPCC president Sunny Joseph says public declarations of candidature and premature proclamations on coalition seat-sharing will invite disciplinary action. The ultimatum assumes significance against backdrop of former KPCC president K. Sudhakaran ‘declaring’ his candidature from Kannur

title: Kavinder Gupta sworn in as Himachal Pradesh  Governor
content: ‘The Governor does not belong to any political party and works for the overall development of the State and society,’ says the senior BJP leader from Jammu & Kashmir, earlier the Lieutenant-Governor of the Ladakh

title: Cabinet clears amendments to insolvency, companies laws
content: The sources said the Cabinet has cleared various amendments to the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code and the Companies Act, 2013

title: Watch: NCERT apologises after SC bans Class 8 textbook over corruption reference
content: NCERT has issued an unconditional apology and withdrawn its Class 8 social science textbook after the Supreme Court objected to a chapter mentioning corruption in the judiciary

title: Andhra Pradesh invites investors to set up theme parks and amusement projects
content: A.P. Tourism Minister said the State has accorded industrial status to tourism, and through the new Tourism Policy 2024–29, several incentives are being offered to attract investments

title: Fake policemen rob Bengaluru realtor; three arrested, gold and cash amounting to ₹52.9 lakh recovered
content: According to police, the victim, H. Hombalayya (53), is a real estate businessman residing in B.E.L Layout under Byadarahalli police station limits on Magadi Road. He had lodged a complaint on February 16.

title: LPG shortage crisis: Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah flags commercial LPG disruption in Bengaluru, writes to Union Minister
content: The Chief Minister said the problem appeared to have arisen following a revised order issued by the Ministry on March 9, which prioritises LPG production for domestic consumers

title: Kannur Mayor injured during LDF siege of Corporation, hospitalised
content: The incident occurred around 9:45 a.m. when the Mayor attempted to enter the Corporation office while LDF activists were staging a blockade. The demonstration allegedly obstructed the Mayor and the councillors from entering the premises, leading to a push-and-shove situation in which the Mayor reportedly sustained injuries

title: No eligible voter’s name to be removed; West Bengal polls to be free, peaceful: CEC Gyanesh Kumar
content: CEC Gyanesh Kumar emphasizes the commitment to uphold voters’ rights amidst political tensions, detailing the Special Intensive Revision process aimed at ensuring a ‘pure’ electoral roll

title: Resolution against Lok Sabha Speaker to ‘save Constitution’, dignity of House: Gourav Gogoi
content: Initiating the debate, Gourav Gogoi claimed that the environment of Parliament has become such that the LoP is not allowed to speak in the House during the debate on the motion of thanks to the President's address

title: Supreme Court urges balance as Centre clarifies IT Rules not meant to curb humour, satire or criticism
content: As Editors Guild and comedian Kunal Kamra ask who decides online content is 'fake or misleading', Centre says 'when we see it, we know it is fake'

title: TACO vs Tehran: Who will blink first—Trump or Khamenei?
content: On Day 11 of the US-Iran war, President Trump claims devastating military losses and a swift end, while Iran signals prolonged resistance. This conflict is evolving into a test of endurance, with Iran aiming to outlast Washington and Israel through attrition and disruption, while Trump faces domestic pressure from rising oil prices and potential midterm backlash.

title: Only for India? Trump's msg to Europe on easing of Russian oil sanctions
content: The United States has informed its European partners that any additional easing of sanctions on Russian crude would largely be confined to shipments destined for India.

title: 'Willing to talk to Iran', says Trump, but warns new leader won't 'live in peace'
content: Trump said that the Iran war was going to "end soon", without providing any specific timeline. He also warned Tehran that if they tried "anything cute", the US would end the nation. He called the Iran war a "short term excursion." During a CBS interview, he said that the war was "very complete" and warned Iran against doing "anything cute".

title: Google's new Al infrastructure chief: Biggest challenge is not simply scaling up but ...
content: Google has appointed Amin Vahdat as Chief Technologist for AI infrastructure, signaling a significant investment in data centers and hardware. The company plans to spend up to $185 billion on AI-related capital expenditures this year, with a focus on redesigning infrastructure for modular, repeatable designs.

title: ‘Rickrolled’ in exam hall? CBSE maths paper QR code leads to viral song
content: A QR code on CBSE Class 12 math papers unexpectedly led students to a Rick Astley music video, sparking concerns about exam paper authenticity. While the Board confirmed the papers are genuine and security remains intact, they are investigating the incident to prevent future occurrences. This unusual prank caused significant student and parent anxiety.

title: 'Mujhe bhool gye kya?': Priya Saroj teases Rinku Singh at airport after T20 World Cup glory - watch
content: India's T20 World Cup 2026 victory sees Rinku Singh return home, sharing a lighthearted airport moment with fiancée Priya Saroj.  Despite a personal struggle following his father's passing and a challenging tournament performance, Rinku's dedication to fulfilling his father's dream resonated deeply.  Sanju Samson's impactful contributions proved crucial for India's triumph.

title: 'Don't get eliminated yourself': Iran warns Trump, slaps down 'empty' threats
content: Iran's security official warned President Trump to be careful after the US leader threatened harsher retaliation for any Strait of Hormuz disruption.  Tehran continues regional attacks, with missile and drone strikes hitting Dubai, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, and Kuwait. Iran's parliament speaker indicated no ceasefire is sought, emphasizing retaliation against aggressors.  Global oil prices have surged due to the conflict.

title: Anthropic takes US govt to court; CFO says: After President Trump’s social media posts, a major ...
content: Anthropic CEO apologized for a memo after talks with the Pentagon broke down, only to file a lawsuit against the Trump administration days later. The company seeks to overturn a national security threat designation, claiming it jeopardizes billions in revenue and irreparably harms its business and investor confidence.

title: India slides down in 2026 GECI rankings: How can it be improved?
content: India slipped to 25th in the 2026 Gender Equality in Chess Index (GECI), highlighting gender imbalance in the sport. Despite strong performances by elite women players, female participation in youth championships remains low, and many girls drop out early. Experts say social pressures, financial hurdles and lack of structured support limit opportunities, stressing the need for better grassroots development and long-term systems to promote women’s chess.

title: Vijay Deverakonda shares moments with Rashmika from mehendi & Pradhanam ceremonies
content: Vijay Deverakonda and Rashmika Mandanna shared heartwarming glimpses from their Mehendi and Pradhanam ceremonies, expressing a wish for more time together.  The couple looked radiant in elegant traditional attire, with Rashmika stunning in an embellished earthy-toned outfit and Vijay in royal robes.  Fans were treated to a behind-the-scenes look at their joyous pre-wedding celebrations, filled with laughter and family.

title: Amazon sends complaint letter to FCC against Elon Musk's Starlink
content: Amazon's Project Kuiper has urged the FCC to reject SpaceX's proposal for a million-satellite constellation, citing a lack of essential technical and space safety details. Amazon argues the plan is speculative, would take centuries to deploy, and could monopolize orbital resources, hindering future space endeavors.

title: One terrorist killed, operation under way along LoC in J&K's Nowshera
content: Indian Army troops thwarted an infiltration attempt along the Line of Control in Jammu and Kashmir's Jhangar sector on Tuesday. Acting on intelligence, alert soldiers engaged two terrorists, successfully eliminating one Pakistan-sponsored infiltrator and preventing any breach of the LoC. A search operation is underway for the second terrorist.

title: 'Dream is to play senior World Cup': Yash Dhull opens up on heart surgery and comeback
content: Under-19 World Cup-winning captain Yash Dhull faced a challenging period after heart surgery, battling a strong desire to return to cricket.  Despite initial setbacks and a risky recovery, Dhull's focus remains on regaining fitness and aiming for a senior World Cup appearance, drawing inspiration from senior players and preparing for future opportunities.

title: Global fuel crisis looms: Gulf nations cut oil output; Hormuz disruptions choke supply
content: The Strait of Hormuz closure is forcing Gulf nations to slash oil production as storage tanks fill. Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, and Iraq have significantly reduced output, with Iraq facing an imminent shutdown. Alternative routes are insufficient, raising fears of a total production halt and impacting global oil prices.

title: Randeep Hooda, Lin Laishram become parents to a baby girl
content: Actor Randeep Hooda and wife Lin Laishram welcomed their first child, a baby girl, on March 10. Hooda shared the joyous news, expressing gratitude to his wife and father. The couple had announced their pregnancy in November last year, sharing their excitement for their 'little wild one'.

title: How much has US-Iran war hit India's oil, LPG and LNG supply? Top 10 points to know
content: India, which is the world’s third-largest importer and consumer of oil, maintains underground strategic petroleum reserves with a capacity of 5.33 million tonnes. However, these reserves are currently filled to about 80 per cent.

title: Ahead of Tamil Nadu polls, Cabinet approves international airport status for Madurai
content: The Union Cabinet has approved declaring Madurai airport an international airport, a move aimed at boosting global connectivity to the temple city. This decision is expected to enhance air connectivity, strengthen Madurai's role as an educational and healthcare hub, and attract international pilgrims and businesses, supporting regional trade and economic activity.

title: Chhattisgarh Tribal woman lynched over witchcraft suspicion; husband, 3 others held
content: A tribal woman in Chhattisgarh's Jashpur district was allegedly killed in a superstition-linked attack after being accused of witchcraft. Her husband, co-wife, and two others have been arrested for the brutal assault, which police believe was motivated by accusations of practising sorcery and causing family misfortunes.

title: Arshdeep Singh penalised by ICC following India's T20 World Cup triumph
content: Indian pacer Arshdeep Singh has been fined 15% of his match fee and received one demerit point for a Level 1 breach of the ICC Code of Conduct. The incident occurred during the T20 World Cup final against New Zealand when he aggressively threw the ball, hitting batter Daryl Mitchell. Arshdeep accepted the sanction, avoiding a formal hearing.

title: Iran war impact on India: LPG shortage concerns rise; which states may feel the heat?
content: West Asia tensions are disrupting commercial LPG supplies to eateries in Bengaluru, Mumbai, and Chennai. Authorities are prioritizing domestic use, impacting businesses. The government is ramping up LPG production, extending refill cycles, and forming a committee to address commercial supply requests amid import concerns.

title: Iran war: Oil surge, midterms worry Trump advisers as they push for an exit plan
content: Amidst surging oil prices and upcoming mid-term elections, President Trump has reportedly been advised to seek an exit plan from the Middle East. Advisors are urging him to articulate that military objectives have largely been achieved, as polls indicate public opposition to the ongoing conflict.

title: Middle East crisis: Asian airlines raise fares as war fuels oil shock fears
content: Asian airlines are hiking fares and planning for potential flight groundings as the Middle East conflict fuels a major oil shock. Indian carriers have already raised long-haul ticket prices by 15%, with Vietnam warning of up to 70% increases. Many Asian airlines, lacking robust fuel hedging, face significant vulnerability as jet fuel prices double, threatening operations and travel demand.

title: 'Ispe mein kya bolun?': Kishan gets annoyed after winning T20 WC title
content: India’s 2026 T20 World Cup win sparked controversy after Kirti Azad criticised the team for taking the trophy to a Hindu temple. Ishan Kishan brushed off questions about the remark, urging reporters to focus on the victory. Kishan also reflected on his comeback journey, while India sealed the title with a dominant win over New Zealand.

title: Uttam Nagar murder case: Accused’s mother moves Delhi high court fearing house demolition
content: The mother of an accused in the Uttam Nagar murder case has approached the Delhi High Court, fearing her house might be demolished like that of a co-accused. This action follows a demolition drive by civic authorities in connection with a Holi clash that resulted in a death.

title: ‘ENHYPEN's Heeseung leaves group: ‘A clear musical path he wishes to pursue’
content: K-pop sensation ENHYPEN's Heeseung is embarking on a solo career, departing from group activities in March 2026. The agency confirmed the decision stems from Heeseung's distinct musical aspirations, with the remaining six members continuing as ENHYPEN. Heeseung expressed gratitude to his bandmates and fans, promising a new album soon.

title: Sikandar Co-Star defends Salman Khan after AR Murugadoss blames him for failure
content: Actor Jatin Sarna defends Salman Khan's punctuality on the 'Sikandar' set, refuting director AR Murugadoss's claims of the star's alleged lack of commitment. Sarna highlighted Salman's hard work and support, even while dealing with injuries. Murugadoss, however, maintains his stance on the film's underperformance.

title: Pune Porsche crash case: SC grants bail to accused driver’s father
content: The Supreme Court granted bail to the father of the minor accused in the 2024 Pune Porsche crash, who allegedly manipulated blood samples. He had been in custody for 22 months. The accident, which killed two software engineers, occurred when the inebriated juvenile allegedly crashed into their motorcycle.

title: Pune model alleges harassment after inter-faith marriage, reconverts to Hinduism
content: A Pimpri-Chinchwad model has reconverted to Hinduism after alleging mental and physical harassment during her marriage to a Muslim businessman. She claims she was pressured to abandon Hindu practices and felt influenced into the marriage, which she now calls 'love jihad'. Enduring years of abuse for her children, she has filed a police complaint and seeks security.

title: 'SKY is the limit': Celebrations galore at Suryakumar Yadav's UP village
content: India's T20 World Cup 2026 victory sparked jubilant celebrations in Suryakumar Yadav's ancestral village, Hathauda. Relatives and villagers cheered the win, which continued into Monday with dhols and greetings for his grandfather. The family had offered prayers for the team's success, with his mother visiting Kashi Vishwanath Temple.

title: Strait of Hormuz crisis: Saudi's Aramco CEO warns of 'catastrophic consequences' for oil markets
content: Saudi Aramco warns that ongoing conflict in the Strait of Hormuz could lead to catastrophic consequences for global oil markets, citing already low inventories and potential impacts on various industries. The company confirmed a small fire at its Ras Tanura Refinery following an attack, which has since been brought under control.

title: ‘He always plays with intent’: Ashwin hails Samson but rues his missed T20 WC hundreds
content: Ravichandran Ashwin shared his thoughts on Sanju Samson's T20 World Cup 2026 performances. Ashwin stated Samson narrowly missed three centuries, scoring 97 not out against West Indies, 89 against England, and 89 against New Zealand. He highlighted Samson's intent to play aggressively, even at the cost of personal records. Samson's batting was crucial for India's title win.

title: Energy crisis hits Pak: Sharif govt takes drastic steps amid Middle East tensions
content: Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has introduced austerity measures to combat fuel shortages caused by the Middle East crisis. These include cutting government spending, reducing fuel allowances for official vehicles, and implementing a work-from-home policy for public sector employees. The government aims to save fuel and mitigate the impact of rising oil import bills.

title: Fuel crisis in Bangladesh: India to supply 5,000 tons of diesel to Dhaka
content: India began supplying 5,000 tons of diesel to Bangladesh via pipeline on Tuesday, part of an annual agreement for 180,000 tons. This delivery aims to alleviate fuel shortages and combat illegal hoarding, as the Bangladesh government intensifies efforts to monitor stock levels and enforce supply limits.

title: BCCI to honour five ICC title-winning Indian teams at awards ceremony
content: The BCCI will host its annual awards ceremony, NAMAN, in New Delhi on March 15 to felicitate multiple Indian teams for their ICC trophy wins over the past year. Players, coaches, and support staff from the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026, ICC Champions Trophy 2025, senior women's team, U19 boys, and U19 girls' victorious squads will be honoured.

title: Jamie Lever opens up about brother Jesse Lever’s tumour battle
content: In a gripping revelation, Jamie Lever recounted the tumultuous journey her family endured following her brother Jesse's childhood diagnosis of a perilous neck tumour. After navigating a perilous surgery that didn’t go as planned, they pursued groundbreaking treatments in the United States. Jesse's remarkable recovery transformed their lives, forging an unbreakable bond and deepening their faith in overcoming adversity.

title: Parliament face-off: Centre, oppn clash as debate on no-confidence motion against Birla begins
content: Lok Sabha witnessed a heated debate as the opposition moved a resolution to remove Speaker Om Birla. Congress MPs questioned the authority of Jagdambika Pal, who was presiding, citing a constitutional vacuum due to the absence of a Deputy Speaker. The government defended Pal's position, leading to sharp exchanges.

title: 'Kar diya na kaam': BJP shares video of Rahul Gandhi praising IYC's 'shirtless' protest
content: The BJP has criticized Rahul Gandhi for backing the Youth Congress' "shirtless" protest at the AI Impact Summit in Delhi. Party leaders accused Gandhi of orchestrating the disruption, which they claim embarrassed India globally. Meanwhile, a court reserved its order on the bail pleas of three Youth Congress workers involved in the protest.

title: Interfaith wedding drama in Thane: Nikah halted after girl alleges rape, conversion bid by tailor
content: A 20-year-old Bhiwandi tailor was arrested for allegedly raping a minor he befriended on social media two years ago. He reportedly attempted to force her into an inter-faith marriage upon her turning 18. Hindutva activists intervened at the planned 'nikah' on March 6, leading to the girl's rescue and the accused's booking under Pocso and IPC sections.

title: CEO Pieter Elbers Quits With "Immediate Effect" 3 Months After IndiGo Crisis
content: IndiGo CEO Pieter Elbers has resigned and Managing Director Rahul Bhatia has been appointed interim charge of management of the affairs of the company, the airline said in regulatory filing today.

title: Temporary LPG Crisis After Hormuz blockade Resolved: Sources
content: The production of cooking gas LPG is up by 10 per cent across oil refineries after the government issued directions yesterday, government sources have told NDTV.

title: Read IndiGo's Full Statement On CEO Pieter Elbers Resigning
content: IndiGo CEO Pieter Elbers resigned on Tuesday, three months after the airline faced massive operational disruptions.

title: Personal Laws Deprive Women Of Rights: Supreme Court Backs Uniform Civil Code
content: The Uniform Civil Code is key to restore the rights of large section of Indian women, but striking down all personal laws at one go could create a leal vacuum, the Supreme Court said today.

title: Cabinet Approves Rs 4,474 Crore Rail Projects In West Bengal And Jharkhand
content: The Cabinet Committee on Economic Affairs, chaired by Prime Minister Narendra Modi, on Tuesday approved two multitracking projects of the Railway Ministry connecting West Bengal and Jharkhand with a total cost of Rs 4,474 crore.

title: Tamil Nadu Restaurants Cut Menu Size, Cite Commercial LPG Shortage
content: Hotels in Chennai and several districts across Tamil Nadu have minimised their food menus, prioritising only essential items, as they struggle to manage a shortage of commercial LPG, or cooking gas, cylinders.

title: Cabinet Okays 4-Laning Of Delhi-Mumbai Expressway Section In Madhya Pradesh
content: The Cabinet on Tuesday approved four-laning of a section of the Delhi-Mumbai expressway in Madhya Pradesh on hybrid annuity mode at a cost of Rs 3,839.42 crore.

title: Why Genetically Modified Food Crops May Be Key To India's Food Security
content: Overcoming water and food stress will be a big challenge for India as it becomes a Viksit Bharat. As India charts its path toward becoming a developed nation by 2047, few challenges loom as large as food security.

title: Supreme Court Grants Bail To Juvenile's Father In Pune Porsche Case
content: The Supreme Court on Tuesday granted bail to the father of the minor alleged to have been driving the Porsche car under the influence of alcohol in 2024 in Pune that killed two persons.

title: Opinion: Opinion | The One Big Reason This Indian T20i Team Is A Nightmare For The Rest
content: Overall, India have way more match-winners in their line-up than any other team. In fact, such is the depth of India's T20i resources that they can field two or three separate teams, and they will all be world-class.

title: "I Don't Believe He Can Live In Peace": Trump's Warning For Mojtaba Khamenei
content: US President Donald Trump said that Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei will not be able to "live in peace". Trump has expressed strong disapproval after Iran elected the second son of Ali Khamenei as the new leader.

title: China's Eyes In Space Exposed US War Machine Before 1st Bomb Fell In Iran War
content: In the final week of February, long before the first missiles were launched and before the name Operation Epic Fury entered public discussion, a set of satellite images began circulating quietly online.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Is The Gulf Now Questioning Its US Ties - And The American 'Guarantee'?
content: Doubts are bound to follow if even the US, the mightiest of the militaries and with 13 major military bases in the region, could not protect it against only one opposing nation - Iran.

title: World's Most Wanted Crude: The Big Deal About Iran's Oil
content: Iran produces roughly 3.5 million barrels of oil per day. The US has been for decades trying to make sure no country buys it, but the customers kept coming to the Islamic nation in the Gulf.

title: Need To Balance Fighting Fake News, Shielding Freedom Of Speech: Top Court
content: The Supreme Court today said there is a need to strike a balance between protecting the country from fake online content and safeguarding the fundamental right to free speech

title: Cabinet Approves Extension Of Jal Jeevan Mission Till December 2028
content: The Union Cabinet on Tuesday approved the extension of Jal Jeevan Mission up to December 2028 with an enhanced outlay of Rs 8.7 lakh crore, Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw said.

title: TVK Chief Vijay Summoned By CBI Again In Karur Stampede Case
content: The CBI has asked actor and TVK chief Vijay to appear before it on March 15 here in the Karur stampede case, officials said Tuesday.

title: "Fridge Mein Milegi": Mumbai Dentist's Suicide, And Shraddha Walkar Warning
content: A 24-year-old student of dentistry has died by suicide at her Mumbai home, allegedly due to mental harassment by her boyfriend.

title: Supreme Court Grants Bail To Singer In Case Over Pahalgam Attack Post
content: The Supreme Court on Tuesday granted anticipatory bail to folk singer Neha Singh Rathore in a case filed against her over a social media post on last year's Pahalgam terror attack in which 26 people were killed.

title: Panthers land Phillips on 4-year deal, sources say
content: former Dolphins linebacker jaelan Phillips agrees to a four-year, $120 million deal with the Carolina Panthers . the deal includes $80 million in guarantees, according to ESPN NFL Insider Adam Schefter . Phillips called landing in Philadelphia "literally the greatest thing that has happened to me"

title: 'Like they robbed a bank in broad daylight': CFB's unique tampering etiquette
content: coach Dabo Swinney calls out Ole Miss for "blatant" tampering . he says school tried to lure a Clemson player into the transfer portal . coach says he bailed for more money at Ole miss .

title: MMA divisional rankings: Borralho bounces back, lands in middleweight top 5
content: caio Borralho has landed in a higher position in ESPN's divisional MMA rankings . he defeated Reinier de Ridder by unanimous decision in the co-main event of UFC 326 in Las Vegas . the victory boosted him up two spots to no. 5 in the 185-pound ranking . it was a second straight loss, but he remains at no. 9.

content: the Miami Dolphins agree to a three-year, $67.5 million deal with quarterback malik Willis . the deal presumably makes him the team's starting quarterback for at least the 2026 season . first-year general manager Jon-Eric Sullivan played coy with his interest in him at the NFL combine .
